ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_url" TEXT /* URL of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "store_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the store's logo */,
  "store_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the store based on user reviews */,
  "store_location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "store_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_model" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "product_specifications" TEXT /* Detailed technical specifications of the product */,
  "product_warranty" TEXT /* Warranty information for the product */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category to support hierarchical categorization */,
  "category_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_stores" (
  "product_store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-store combination */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product in the store */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the product (e.g., new, used, refurbished) */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the product in the store (including tax and shipping) */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the product in the store (e.g., in stock, out of stock) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the product */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied to the product */,
  "return_policy" TEXT /* Return policy for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the product's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_stores_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_stores_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buy_links" (
  "buy_link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buy link */,
  "product_store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product-store combination */,
  "buy_link_url" TEXT /* URL of the buy link */,
  "buy_link_text" TEXT /* Text to display for the buy link (e.g., 'Buy Now', 'Add to Cart') */,
  "buy_link_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the buy link image */,
  "buy_link_category" TEXT /* Category of the buy link (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buy_link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_buy_links_product_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_store_id") REFERENCES product_stores ("product_store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "review_unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., admin, product manager, customer) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the user */,
  "user_city" TEXT /* City of the user */,
  "user_state" TEXT /* State of the user */,
  "user_country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user placing the order */,
  "product_store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product-store combination being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_store_id") REFERENCES product_stores ("product_store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'shipped', 'delivered') */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the status update */,
  "status_updated_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order containing the item */,
  "product_store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product-store combination being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item being ordered */,
  "item_cost" REAL /* Cost of the item */,
  "item_discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "item_tax" REAL /* Tax applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_store_id") REFERENCES product_stores ("product_store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being recommended */,
  "recommended_product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended product */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., 'similar products', 'frequently bought together') */,
  "recommended_product_store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product-store combination for the recommended product */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the recommendation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_recommended_product_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_product_store_id") REFERENCES product_stores ("product_store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_recommendations_recommended_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Query being searched */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date the search was performed */,
  "search_results_count" INTEGER /* Number of results returned for the search query */,
  "search_duration" REAL /* Duration of the search query in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_history" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the purchase */,
  "product_store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product-store combination being purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the purchase was made */,
  "purchase_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_product_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_store_id") REFERENCES product_stores ("product_store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being notified */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., stock, sale) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_notifications_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
